title: belharnosia canadensis
side_effects: Belharnosia canadensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extract can also cause respiratory issues, including coughing and shortness of breath. In severe cases, consuming large amounts of the plant's extract can lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of adverse reactions.
